headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Neutral on Equity Residential, Raises Price Target to $66
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Richard Anderson   maintains Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $64 to $66.
